creator: delphij@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->closed

Submitter confirms that the problem occours only in an environment 
where a higher version of OpenSSL is installed from the ports 
collection, causing pam_ldap.so to reference a conflicting 
version of libcrypto (as system sshd is linked against base 
system's bundled OpenSSL), and it does not seem to be related 
to the openldap-server update.
